mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_SEQ, ORGN_FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, EXT_FILE, FILE_MIME_TYPE, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') AS DEL_YN FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY FILE_SEQ

SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_SEQ, ORGN_FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, EXT_FILE, FILE_MIME_TYPE, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') AS DEL_YN FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq} AND COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_SEQ, ORGN_FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, EXT_FILE, FILE_MIME_TYPE, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') AS DEL_YN FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE SAVE_FILE_NM = #{saveFileNm} AND COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_SEQ, ORGN_FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, EXT_FILE, FILE_MIME_TYPE, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') AS DEL_YN FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE SAVE_FILE_NM = #{saveFileNm} AND COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('FILE_DETAIL_SEQ')
INSERT INTO FILE_DETAIL ( FILE_ID, FILE_SEQ, ORGN_FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, EXT_FILE, FILE_MIME_TYPE, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{fileSeq}, #{orgnFileNm}, #{saveFileNm}, #{extFile}, #{fileMimeType}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize} )
